title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–11 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #20, Unknown person #3 as the Colosseum block battle reaches a brutal finish, setting up the tournament’s next stage and sharpening Luffy’s path toward the fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He could throw a punch po- werenful enough

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to blow away even the section of the AU- Dience in front of him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Here's no way some- thing like that could happen!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's something unsettling in the air ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He's kept quiet in the middle of that formation,but in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The King is about to make his move!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Was that incident from a while back really true!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Out of the way! I'll snap his neck!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: UGehhh- Hi what a tenacious bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What the hell's this? Let go!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Hahha, let go? Don't make light of the power of springs...

summary: Pages 9–11 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
